title: cordylanthus helleri
intro: Cordylanthus helleri, also known as Heller's bird's beak or bird's beak plant, is a perennial plant species in the family Orobanchaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant is believed to have health benefits like reducing inflammation and acting as an expectorant, helping to loosen and clear mucus from the lungs. In herbal preparations, Cordylanthus helleri is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
